purpose: A library of resume/CV layout templates. Give this file to an LLM (e.g. Gemma via Antigravity) along with a person's real details, and ask it to pick one 'template_id' and fill the 'fields' with that person's info to produce a matching CV (as HTML/CSS, or as instructions for a design tool).
how_to_use: 1. Pick a template_id (or let the model pick the one that best fits the person's job/industry).
2. Give the model the person's real data: name, title, photo, contact, education, experience, skills, etc.
3. Ask the model to output HTML+CSS (or a docx/pptx layout) that follows 'layout', 'color_palette', and 'sections' exactly, just replacing placeholder text with the real data.
4. Keep photo circular crop, section order, and color roles the same as specified — that's what makes it 'look like' the template.

layout.left_panel: dark charcoal sidebar (~35% width) with profile, skills, contact
layout.right_panel: white background with diagonal cut, circular photo top-right, timeline-style education/experience

typography.name: large bold, two-tone (first name accent color, last name white)
typography.section_labels: small caps, rotated vertical labels for EDUCATION / EXPERIENCE

layout.left_panel: dark sidebar (~35%) with photo in circle + geometric line accents, references, languages, skills
layout.right_panel: light background with rounded orange/brown banner containing name + title, timeline sections below

layout.left_panel: light gray column with arch-shaped photo frame at top, education/skills/languages/contact below
layout.right_panel: white with dark gray header band containing name + title, profile/experience/achievements below

layout.left_panel: navy sidebar (~35%) with circular gold-ringed photo, contact/education/skills/languages
layout.right_panel: white with name/title header, about-me paragraph, vertical-line experience timeline

layout.left_panel: sage-green column: full photo block at top, then profile/skills/awards on cream background, contact at bottom
layout.right_panel: cream background: name/title header, work experience, educational history
layout.photo_shape: rectangle, full-bleed at top of left column

layout.left_panel: sage-green narrow column with square photo at top, contact icons list, expertise list, education list
layout.right_panel: white/cream with name + title header (dark bar), profile paragraph, job experience entries

layout.left_panel: cream/off-white background: large name in two weights, title, skills percentages, education, language donut charts
layout.right_panel: dark green background: circular photo top, rounded 'about me' pill banner spanning both halves, professional experience list

generation_prompt_example: Using cv_templates.json, generate an HTML+CSS resume for [PERSON NAME], a [JOB TITLE], using template_id '[CHOSEN TEMPLATE]'. Fill every field in that template's 'fields' object with this real data: [PASTE DATA]. Keep the exact layout type, color roles, and section order from the template — only change text/photo content.
